reviews.title: Great mouse!
reviews.text: Finally a mouse that doesn't use a battery. I wasn't paying attention so it just died, but it still works while plugged into your USB. It has a great hand feel, and easy to use. I'm really happy with this.

reviews.title: Works really well so far
reviews.text: My old mouse broke so I ordered something new that I have never tried. Set up was very easy. Just plug in the little USB port wireless device that is included and the mouse already seemed to be at least partially charged so away I went immediately without issue. It comes with some very nice colors that are changeable with a push button on the bottom. I like the moving multiple colors myself. Very nice unit for the price.

title: EAXBUX 【Built in Jiggler Covert Mouse Jiggler,2 in 1 Wireless Mouse with Jiggler, Undetectable Mouse Mover with ON/Off Switch, Drive Free,Simulate Mouse Movement to Keep Computer Awake,Plug and Play
features: 【Mouse Combined with Mouse Jiggler】The EAXBUX Mouse with jiggler is currently the only product on the market that combines a wireless mouse with a mouse jiggler. When you need to leave your computer for a short while, just press a button to activate the mouse jiggler function to keep you online

【Random Movement to Keep PC Active】EAXBUX mouse jiggler will keep your PC/Laptop active by moving the cursor automatically. Just press the ON/OFF button to turn on the mouse jiggler function,the computer screen will always on,thereby keeping your Microsoft Teams, Lync,Skype etc. stay online.Simulate real random mouse movement and this mouse mover 100% undetectable byIT because it is just a wireless mouse that with mouse jiggler function. Absolutely security!

【2.4G wireless mice】The unique feature of EAXBUX Mouse with jiggler is that if you don't press the button of the jiggler function, it is a practical 2.4G wireless optical mouse, which can meet the needs of your daily use.One with dual functions, this wireless mouse with mouse jiggler function is definitely your best choice

【Driver-Free & Plug and Play】The wireless mouse with mouse mover requires no driver, just plug it into your computer and if you need the jiggler function, just press the button, the cursor will start to move automatically. No annoying software installation, easy to use.

【Wide Compatible & More services】This undetectable computer mouse jiggler supports most popular systems like iOS,Win7, Win8, Win10, UNIX, Mac OS, Chrome OS and Linux.we provide 2-year warranty free replacement policy.If you are not satisfied with the item, please feel free to contact us via Amazon and we will solve all your problems within 24 hours. What we care about most is the customer experience！

reviews.title: Hey it works great HIGHLY RECOMMEND
reviews.text:
It works does random motion immediately recognized by my dell laptop workstation
I’m not monitored by my boss so can’t give insight to that consideration. IT KEEPS MY SCREEN open so I don’t have to keep logging in
Wish the jiggle button had a light to tell it’s active HOWEVER perhaps this is a good thing (it immediately jiggles so I know it’s working) no light no one knows around me it’s on
I’d highly recommend this

reviews.title: Great Wireless Mouse and Jiggler
reviews.text: This mouse is the perfect size and weight, moves well and clicks quietly. I love the jigglier functionality; you just press the button built into the mouse and it keep the mouse cursor moving on the screen. It keeps my window open and Office teams active. I should have gotten a mouse like this long ago; it allows you additional freedom at work when you need to be away from your desk for a while. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Very good idea
reviews.text: Very good idea to have this jiggler built in, other similar products need to have an additional equipment, and put mouse on it for moving, not as convenient as this one. But sometimes this product is not stable, after a couple of hours working, I found the mouse stopped moving, I checked and found the battery light was off due to unknown reason, and after I reset the battery, the mouse moved again, and such kinds of issue happened several times. Therefore, I can only gave 4 stars review. But anyway I like this cute tool.

reviews.title: Keep screensavers from activating or keep from being logged off for no activity!
reviews.text:
A very handy, take it with you mouse that will keep pretty much anything from timing out due to lack of activity. When you need to step away for a few minutes and not have anything you are working on, just press the button on top to activate the jiggler and keep the mouse pointer gently moving.
I have only had this for a week or so and it has already proved it's worth. When my screen saver kicks off any process I have running slows way down. When I am rendering media this is a major pain, or I should say "used to be a major pain".
The dongle for USB connectivity stores in the mouse itself so you can carry the mouse and never have to worry about losing the dongle. It also has an on/off switch to save battery life.
A nice piece of gear, I suggest this for anyone that doesn't want to time out again.

reviews.title: Quiet and Functional
reviews.text:
I have been searching for a product like this for a long time! I work remotely most days and have to rely on connecting through a VPN connection. The connection automatically disconnects after a certain time frame, so this jiggler function is great! I can click the button to activate and leave the computer.
The setup on this mouse is so simple. I plugged in the USB and the mouse worked right away.
My favorite feature that was unexpected was how quiet the mouse is. I wasn’t use to not being able to hear a click. Such a nice product!

reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text:
The factory feet on my mouse were leaving dark spots on my light colored desk at work.
These fit great and have noticeably lower friction than the worn factory pads. The adhesive is strong but repositionable if you don't get it right first time.
When the old pads are removed, they can split into separate layers, but you should be able to get down to the bare plastic if you take care to grab the lowest layer of clear adhesive.

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.text:
It's the best wireless mouse I have used so far, and the price was reasonable. It does have a tendency to skip around if the battery starts to get low of if it's not really close to my laptop. It does work, it fits nicely in my hand and it feels sturdy. I've had others that felt as if they would shatter if just dropped on the carpet.

Comfort - Great
Price - Fair
Battery life - Okay
Sturdiness - Good
Good product overall

Cons

- compared to wired mouse, precision can be improved

reviews.title: ** Use tips ** Nice mouse....
reviews.text:
Nice mouse.... slightly large, and I have large hands. If you have small hands, I would purchase a size down.

It is simple to set up, works well (so far), and I like the wireless feature.

Tips:

My other mouse had a place to store the USB unit. This one also has a storage slot, which makes it convenient. Otherwise, you can leave the USB connector in the laptop (If it fits in your case with the device inserted...)

Be sure to turn off the device when not in use to conserve your batteries. (Sliding switch on bottom)

This mouse is Windows compatible. I run Windows 7.... works fine.

If you have a trackpad that drives you crazy, these devices are great!

Enjoy!

reviews.title: Perfect Replacement For M505
reviews.text: My M505 finally quit working dependably for me after nearly 3 years of dedicated service. I loved the design and how I never had to change the batteries, not even once in those 3 years. So I sought out another one only to find they are no longer made. But I did discover this M525 and after a little research I purchased. I am extremely happy with this newer version of my older mouse. It is nearly identical to my M505, so close in fact that I have yet to notice any major differences except for the color. I recommend this M525 to anyone who likes the freedom of a wireless mouse and doesn't want to bother with changing batteries!

Very comfortable.

Have not played anything that could be considered a stress test. I like that you can turn it off, but I dislike that you have to remember to turn it off.

reviews.title: wireless mouse
reviews.text: My old wireless finally died - dropped too many times onto the hardwood floor.  I purchased one that was like the old one and this one.  This one is flatter.  I ended up choosing to use this one.  It loaded quickly and is very comfortable to use.  Very, very quiet click - almost silent.  Having said all of this, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text: This is a good value for the cost.  If you need something small and easy to carry around with you this is great. Especially right now I am between working from home but sometimes have to visit the office and the less and smaller items I carry, the better!  This is nice and slim and works great with my laptop.  I don't really like to use batteries but as long as you switch it off when not in use you will be able to get quite a bit of use out of one.

reviews.text:
Rating this PINKCAT wireless mouse is difficult in terms of "stars". The price-point and your intended use are big factors.

I'll get one thing out of the way to save you some time - if you're a gamer, I would say that this is not going to have the stable accuracy you need. In fact, I think it will frustrate gamers, so if you're a gamer then you need to move on/up to something more expensive. Just my opinion.

My usage is for work. Lots and lots of work - like 12-15 hours a day of non-stop "click click click" work, so I'm basing my review on that and in comparison, to my main "workhorse" mouse.

My main mouse is a Logitech Anywhere MX, which is an incredible mouse but is also about $50 more than this PINKCAT mouse. I wanted to find something similar in both size and features as my more expensive mouse but with silent click and more as a backup, and for basic uses this fits the bill pretty well.

As you can see in the photos, this mouse is only slightly larger than a Logitech Anywhere MX, so it's still plenty small enough for laptop / portable / small space use. Now that you know what I'm comparing it to, I'll get right to the pros & cons.

PROS:

- Very light-weight, significantly lighter than my MX, yet still similar in size & shape.

- The "silent" buttons are truly that! Something I wish was a feature with my noisy MX buttons.

- Only requires one AA battery (my MX requires two) and excellent battery life.

- Scroll-wheel is smooth, quiet, and comfortable.

- The dull mat style surface is very comfy and doesn't get sticky like the shiny slick surface of my MX.

- The "back" and "forward" thumb-buttons work as expected for quick switching back & forth on web pages and tabs / locations in file explorer folders.

CONS:

- Even with the "3 Grade Adjustable DPI" function, I wouldn't recommend this mouse for gaming or fine digital artwork in apps like Photoshop.

- The signal and receiver seem to be a little easily susceptible to signal issues and occasional jitter, but that could be due to the number of various devices I have in the room. When I first tested it out there seemed to be a lot of jitter and the cursor jumped around a bit, but after switching it to a different system than the one I used my MX on, and adjusting the mouse settings a bit in Windows, it has been pretty smooth.

- No side-to-side push with the scroll wheel, unlike my MX. (But again, we're talking $8 compared to $58).

- Battery compartment door is flimsy. It's OK, but handle with care when popping it open.

Overall, this mouse is fine for basic use, and for its price-point it's excellent.

This was really hard to rate in terms of "stars" , especially coming from the perspective of someone who owns a more finely tuned & designed expensive mouse. So... for the price and for basic use I'd give it 5 stars, but for smooth accuracy it's not going to measure-up to something like a high-end Logitech and would be more like 3 stars in that aspect. But for 8 bucks It's a great mouse - gets the job done for standard computer uses, and it's definitely light, silent buttons! So over all I have to give it 4 stars.

reviews.title: These are great sounding computer speakers
reviews.text:
I have the Klipsch Pro Media Thx 2.1. These are great sounding computer speakers. They best the Bose Companion II which sound terrible in comparison. the Bose sound shallow and weak. These speakers have 3 1/2 inch long throw woofers for the midrange, and a real subwoofer for the lows. They are great sounding for what they are and the best computer speakers to my knowledge in the $200 or below genre.

However, they need to be tweaked. The subwoofer is slightly heavy (although an adjustment is on your speakers) and the highs are slightly bright like other Klipsch speakers, and the midrange is slightly recessed. Simply set your computer system from Windows at 70% output roughly, then pull up iTunes (if you use it) or another equalizer, and set the low bass from about 65K down about 3db below average, put the midrange from about 125K on up to about three 3DB higher than normal, then set the 1K at zero, and above that from 2K on up about 3db below zero. You can adjust that a little to make a curve

These speakers are great. I went with refurbished myself at a little over half price. Enjoy! They are great.

P.S. I am an audiophile who has a good ear and an extremely good stereo system. These do not equal that, but sound great for what they are and better than all others for $200 or less and close to the $400 plus systems.

reviews.title: Not natural sounding but that's how I like my computer speakers to sound
reviews.text: I'm not clear what the differences are between this model and the other identically labelled model from other sellers that sell for less money. You shouldn't pay more than $120-$135 for these from what I can tell after shopping around. I bought mine in "like-new" condition for $99 with Prime free shipping and I'm ecstatic about the sound quality. Subwoofer is boomy and the sat speakers are bright. Typical Klipsch sound. Not natural sounding but that's how I like my computer speakers to sound. I compared these to the Logitech at $105-$120. I own a pair of those too. I'm a fan of Logitech. Make that, I used to be a fan. Going to go with Klipsch if I ever have need for more speakers. These sound great. You won't be disappointed if you like the "Klipsch sound."

reviews.title: The satellite speakers are clear with a good amount of range and depth whether playing games or ...
reviews.text: First experience with Klipsch speakers and I am thoroughly impressed! Wasn't expecting the amount of impact from the subwoofer (my previous pc came with a factory 5.1 setup and fall flat compared to these). The satellite speakers are clear with a good amount of range and depth whether playing games or listening to music/watching videos. I was worried that a 2.1 setup would leave something to be desired vs a 5.1 setup, but I'm glad I made the jump!

reviews.title: No better computer speaker out there
reviews.text:
There is simply no better set of computer speakers out there. The subwoofer rivals those home theater setups as well. I have this in my office connected to a Mac Mini which I often use for iTunes and watching movies, and recording to Garageband.

I have never cranked the volume 100%, it's incredibly loud at 65%. Bass is very smooth and powerful.

I actually needed speakers for an outdoor wedding and actually brought these to the event, no one complained about not being able to hear the ceremony even 20 rows back.

If you can't afford a home theatre system, consider this 2.1 for your living room as well. This will surprise you.

reviews.title: Responsiveness is abysmal
reviews.text:
I have a Fellowes mouse pad (vinyl material) and this mouse moves the pointer on it like it is stuck in mud - very slow. Yes, i removed the coated ovals on the bottom. I tried on my desktop protective cover (a softer plastic) and it was even worse. Putting the mouse on paper made it move the mouse pointer faster and smoother but occasionally had hiccups. This is unacceptable for gaming, let alone basic office work. This wasn't even the worse part of this mouse.

The mouse buttons require you to click on the very edge of the button to recognize the click. Because my finger tips reach about 75% of the length I would have to click 3+ times to get Windows 11 to recognize I clicked the button. I made sure to charge the battery to 100% and tried numerous USB ports on my computer and on my docking station to no avail. Would not recommend.

reviews.title: Very nice mouse!
reviews.text:
I've seen a few of these mice around and this one was inexpensive enough to give the design a try. I normally use only Bluetooth mice because I don't like losing a USB port to a dongle, but made an exception.

I have to say I'm impressed with this device. The performance is rock-solid and it feels great to use. I also like the slightly rubberized finish; feels good in the hand. What I'm doing is alternating between this and a conventional mouse every few days to give my wrist a break. The reduction in wrist discomfort is noticeable.

It's worth losing a USB port to a dongle

title: Bluetooth Mouse for iPad MacBook Air Pro Mini Mac iPhone Tablet Cell Phone, Computer Wireless Mouse for Laptop PC Desktop, Dual Mode (Bluetooth + 2.4G), Portable Optical Cordless Mice Silent (Silver)
description:
Specifications:
Bluetooth Edition: Bluetooth 5.0 Mouse Dimensions: 4.21 X 2.36 X 1.26 inchs Mouse Weight: 2.05 ounces Operating Range: Up to 33 ft/ 10 meters Buttons Number: 3 Keys DPI Level: 1600 DPI Battery Powered: 1 AA battery powered,
Battery NOT Included
The mouse supports Bluetooth and 2.4GHz USB connection
Note: The Bluetooth Mouse only compatible with iPad OS/iOS 13 and above. So you need to update the system of your ipad and iphone to iPad OS/iOS 13 and above, and turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch, then connect the mouse.
How to connect Bluetooth mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to Bluetooth. 2: Then Turn on the Bluetooth switch of your tablet or mobile phone, and search for Bluetooth mouse. 3: Click the Bluetooth mouse on tablet phone or other devices to connect to your device.
How to connect 2.4GHz USB mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to 2.4G. 2: Then insert the USB receiver into the USB port of the notebook or computer, and then you can use it.
Package Included:
1x Dual Mode Mouse (Bluetooth+2.4GHz) 1x USB Receiver 1x User Manual
Broad Compatibility:
Compatible with iPadOS iPad 10.2/9.7 5th 6th 7th 8th 9th gen, iPad Air 10.5/10.9, iPad Pro 11/12.9 2nd 3rd 4th 5th generation, iPad Mini 5/4/3, iPhone 12 11 pro max, iPhone X XS XR max, etc.
Q&A
Where is the USB receiver?
The USB receiver is in the mouse, you can find it when you open the mouse's battery cover. When you don't use it, you can plug the nano receiver into the USB storage slot again, so you don't lose the USB.
Connectivity and USB troubleshooting
Restart your computer and make sure the mouse is turned on and not too far away from the USB Receiver.
Warranty: 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.
Bluetooth mouse only compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above.

Both modes provide a reliable and stable connection up to 33 feet with virtually no drop-outs and delays. The wireless mouse realizes free switches between two devices with one mouse only by one click. Note: You can't use Bluetooth and 2.4G mode at the same time. The USB dongle is stored in the compartment next to the mouse battery slot.

Comfortable & Quiet Click: The wireless mouse features a hand-friendly contoured shape for all-day comfort. Quiet clicks allow you to focus on your work without worrying about disturbing others or causing unwanted distracting noises. 1600 DPI cursor sensitivity provides smooth, precise tracking and scrolling for easy navigation on most surfaces. The sturdy rubber scroll wheel prevents your hands from slipping when rolling. The nano receiver is stored on the back of the mouse.

Long Battery Life: The mouse is powered by 1 AA battery (battery is not included). The mouse will enter into auto-sleep mode after 10 minutes of inactivity, and you can click any key to wake it up. Long battery life and working time, it can be used for months without battery replacement. There is an ON/ OFF button on the back of the mouse, which can be turned off to save power. Battery NOT included.

Protable & Durable Design: The ergonomic design and smooth surface fit your hands perfectly and provide you with a comfortable experience. You can take it anywhere you need it for office, home, meetings or travel. Tested over 3 million clicks to ensure mouse durability. What You Will Get: Wireless Bluetooth Mouse, USB Receiver, User Manual, 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.

reviews.text: My husband is using this mouse for his MacBook Pro and he says it's working great! It was easy to pair with his laptop. Just turn the bluetooth on, then press the pairing button on the back of the mouse and the devices will find each other. The mouse is comfortable for him to hold and use. He says it's quiet and responsive. We haven't had it long enough to comment on battery longevity, but so far so good.

reviews.title: Nice portable mouse
reviews.text: It seems very well made and works great on mac and windows. No complaints really-- the color is also nice.

reviews.title: I Really Needed This....
reviews.text: This bluetooth mouse is life.  I really was in desperate need due to my last mouse giving out on me.  This is compatible with my iPad and it's small enough to fit within my slim case.  The battery life, I'm not too sure.  For right now, everything else for me is a plus.

title: Trueque Wireless Mouse E702 2.4GHz Portable Computer Mouse with USB Receiver, Comfortable Silent Mice for Laptop, Chromebook, PC, Notebook, Desktop, Windows, Mac (Mint Green)
features: 【Plug & Play, Wireless Convenience】The 2.4 GHz wireless mouse provides a powerful, reliable connection, effective up to 33ft of range, effectively eliminates delays, dropouts, and interference, freeing you from wired troubles. Simply plug the USB receiver into your computer or laptop to start working in seconds, no drivers need to be installed. Snap-in USB receiver stows conveniently in the bottom of the wireless mouse. So you don't accidentally lose it while traveling.

【Silent & High-Precision Wireless Mouse】The computer mouse buttons use mute buttons to reduce the click noise by more than 90%, and passed the 3 Million times keystroke test to guarantee superb durability. 1600 DPI movement resolution enables responsive cursor control for precise tracking, works on most surfaces.

【Portable & Ergonomic Design】This computer mouse is back to the classics, with a streamlined arc design, ergonomic grip and symmetrical left and right, which can reduce the pressure on your hands, wrists and arms caused by long-term use, and will not be fatigued after long hours of work and study. The buttons are made of high-gloss material, simple and stylish, and the portable design makes it easy to store in a travel bag, compact and portable, very suitable for travel.

【Power Saving and Long-Lasting】The mouse for laptop only needs one AA battery, with a built-in three-speed sleep solution, which saves power and consumes less power and prolongs battery life. After the mouse for laptop enters the power saving mode, you can move the for laptop or click any button to wake it up. Note: powered by 1*AA battery (not included).

【Wide Compatibility & Great Service】This USB mouse is compatible with Windows 2000, ME, XP(X64), Vista, 7, 8, 10, Linux and Mac OS X 10.4 or above; as well as compatible for Chromebook, PC, Laptop, Notebook, Computer and MacBook.【Pls Note: this USB mouse is connected by USB receiver, will NOT compatible with Mac book Pro or other devices which only have Type C ports】

reviews.title: Great Mouse
reviews.text:
I enjoy this mouse a lot, I like that it is Bluetooth. I mainly got it because I love the colors and it matches everything else in my room. But I found it works very well so far I have had it for a couple weeks now I work from home so it's a good addition to an at-home office set up!

There has been one time where I had to take out the battery and reinsert it because it was lagging a bit but I have had no other problems other than that!

reviews.title: Exactly what I needed
reviews.text: I was on the hunt for a purple mouse but wanted it to be quite muted. This is literally perfect! The wheel and the mouse have all held up perfectly and the sleep mode is great to not waste the batteries!

reviews.title: Great little mouse
reviews.text: I really like the size of this mouse, it works great. My only qualm about this that there isn't an on and off switch. It does goes to sleep but if a button is pushed it wakes up. I wish you could manually turn it on or off. But other than that it's good quality and I haven't had an issue.

reviews.title: Cute and affordable
reviews.text: Love the color!!! Works perfect! Thanks!

reviews.title: cheap mouse that gets the job done
reviews.text: This is a cheap mouse that gets the job done. There's no on and off button, so do know it's going to drain the battery no matter you use it or not as long as there's a battery in it. I consider myself having a pretty big hand for a woman (around 12in from thumb to my pinky when stretched), I still feel this mouse is a tad big for me that it wasn't intuitive when grabbing onto it. I also didn't like the edges/ dents for your thumb and ring finger. I now know a slimmer mouse without edges works better for me and I can't recommend this mouse unless you are looking for something less than ten.

title: Cute Hamster Mouse,Wireless Mouse 2.4 Ghz 1200 DPI Less Noise Cartoon Animal Shape Portable Optical Mice with USB Receiver for Notebook Windows Computer PC Laptop Gift Kids(Gray)
features: [Note:The USB receiver is on the bottom of the mouse, next to the battery slot.]Plug & Play, just plug the USB receiver into your PC.Battery Powered, just only need 1x AA battery(Not include)
Cartoon Animal Shape Design:Creative hamster shape, add fun to the typing process, The lightweight and simple features make the mouse perfect for the journey, office, home
2.4GHz Wireless Mouse: Ensures reliable connection with an increased working distance of up to 33' (15m) and eliminates delays, dropouts and interference.
Slim & Portable Design: convenient, only 60g weight, about 10.5 x 7.30x 4.0 cm. Perfect for travelling carry and it can be easily put in to your laptop bag and ultra-space saving.
Support most computer to control the system.System requirement: for Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10.

reviews.title: Cute item but it doesn't stay connected.
reviews.text:
Super cute item! It took me a while to get use to the small click space and it tracks well but the main issues is the USB isn't reliable. Anytime I put the laptop to sleep or I don't use the mouse for a while I have to unplug the USB and turn the mouse on/off. It is really inconvenient but my return wind has closed to exchange it.

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

reviews.title: low quality
reviews.text: I received a replacement for the first one that would shut off and on constantly. The 2nd one worked for about a week and then stopped. When trying to remove the USB connector from my laptop it cam apart. Part of it got stuck in the USB port. It took over 5 minutes to pull the rest of it out with tweezers! I returned it for a refund. This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Cheap- don’t buy it!
reviews.text: This mouse works some of the time... very cute but unreliable. For the return process, I had to pack and ship on my own. It cost half the price of the mouse to return.

reviews.title: Cutest thing ever
reviews.text: So adorable! It moves super smoothly and I love the color. It is wider than most mice I'd say, but not by much. It still feels natural and easy to use. The buttons are easy to use as well. My only concern is that when I have to wake my computer up from sleep mood, I really have to shake it. But that may be my sensitivity settings, but they were just fine with my previous mouse. Either way, this is super cute and I love it!

reviews.title: DESTROYS PORTS! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.text: The first one died after 2 hours. It damaged the port on one side of my laptop. The replacement did the same thing to the other side. I now have no functioning ports - can’t use another mouse or flash drives. This company owes me a new laptop!!!!

reviews.title: awesome mouse, awesome vendor!
reviews.text: mouse was delivered a little earlier than expected, which is great! corsair is a highly trusted brand and the last one we had, same model, lasted a good 3 years before the stroller wheel gave out. there probably is a way to just clean the wheel, but we just got a new mouse and intend on keeping the old one. it has extremely smooth dpi and motion with a nicely weighted feel. good solid unit!

reviews.title: Good FPS mouse
reviews.text: The materials wear really easily but it was perfect for my build and is light enough for the games I play, love the dpi buttons

reviews.title: double click problem after only 6 months
reviews.text: Bought this 6 months ago, now 6 months later I'm having this "double left click" problem. I thought this issue is rare, turned out it's extremely popular with this new Corsair mouse. My last 2 Corsair mice lasted 12 years, this one is garbage. Do not buy this unless you plan on doing RMA with Corsair while waiting 30 days for them to replace your mouse like I am right now. Extremely frustrating. If you don't believe me, search for all other corsair mice, they all have low 4 star reviews with double left click problems.
